meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to master SaaS pricing and overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. A beginner-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship fast.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build a high-value SaaS pricing calculator as a micro-SaaS tool. By solving a transparent business problem, you demonstrate technical authority and commercial awareness. Use Antigravity to scaffold the architecture and Claude Code to iterate the logic, creating a deployable asset that proves your expertise.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the silence of a non-existent portfolio echoing louder than your ambition. Clients aren't asking for your resume; they’re asking for proof of impact. The gap between 'aspiring freelancer' and 'hired pro' isn't years of experience—it’s the ability to demonstrate a tangible, revenue-generating outcome.

The secret? Stop waiting for the perfect project to land. Build the tool that every SaaS founder desperately needs: a dynamic pricing calculator. By engineering this solution, you transform from a commodity coder into a strategic partner who understands the bottom line, effectively silencing the 'no portfolio' objection before it even starts.

steps.title: Define the Value-Based Logic
steps.description: Before writing code, define the pricing variables (e.g., MAU, storage, API calls). This shows you understand SaaS economics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a clean, responsive UI structure for a SaaS pricing calculator that takes three inputs: Monthly Active Users, Data Storage in GB, and API Request Volume. Use a modern, minimalist aesthetic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file pricing_logic.ts --task 'Implement a tiered pricing calculation engine that supports annual vs monthly billing toggles.'

steps.title: Architecting for Scalability
steps.description: Structure your project so it looks like a production-grade SaaS, not a student project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular folder structure for a React-based SaaS calculator, including components for the input slider, result summary, and email capture form.

steps.title: Implementing Interactive Feedback
steps.description: Use real-time state management to make the calculator feel snappy and professional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook using Framer Motion to animate the pricing result display whenever the input values change.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add smooth layout transitions to the pricing display using Framer Motion hooks.'

steps.title: Adding Lead Capture
steps.description: Convert the calculator into a lead-gen tool for your own freelance business.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a form component that saves the calculated results to a JSON blob and triggers a mock API call to a CRM endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code --add 'API integration for lead capture using a mock service worker'

steps.title: Deployment and Portfolio Integration
steps.description: Deploy the tool as a sub-path on your personal portfolio site.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration file for Vercel that includes environment variables for analytics tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate vercel.json and finalize build scripts for production deployment.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Compare with Competitor' toggle in your calculator; it shows you understand market positioning.
Use a unique URL parameter for shared results so users can send their custom pricing to their team.
Add a 'Download PDF Quote' button; it’s a high-effort feature that clients perceive as extremely valuable.
Keep your CSS variables in a single theme file to demonstrate your mastery of design systems.
Record a 60-second Loom video explaining the 'Why' behind your code and embed it next to the tool.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, share the link on LinkedIn with a breakdown of the business logic you solved. This positions you as a consultant, not just a developer.
content.conversion_block: You now have a portfolio piece that proves you can build, design, and think like a SaaS founder. Don't let this momentum stall—your next client is waiting for this exact level of professional polish. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
